display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Men's College Lacrosse
programme.desc: Second Round.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Having worn out his welcome in the NBA, Paul Westhead heads to Loyola Marymount University to perfect his run-and-gun offensive system with players Hank Gathers and Bo Kimble.

programme.title: 30 for 30
programme.desc: Filmmaker Kirk Fraser uses interviews with teammates, family and friends of Len Bias in an effort to determine what happened on the night Bias died.

programme.title: Why Not Both! The Story of NC State's 2024 Season
programme.desc: This program shines a spotlight on the NC State men's and women's basketball teams, that both reached the 2024 Final Four.

programme.title: We're #1! - 1991 & 1992 Duke Blue Devils
programme.desc: Through a mix of archival footage, photographs, game broadcasts and exclusive interviews, We're #1! looks back at the memorable Duke teams that defined an era of college basketball.

programme.title: We're #1! 1993 North Carolina Tar Heels
programme.desc: Players from the 1993 Men's Basketball North Carolina Tar Heels. Reflect on their great season.

programme.title: Coach K & Roy Williams: Rivals Reunited
programme.desc: Two of the most successful NCAA basketball coaches in history, Mike Krzyzewski and Roy Williams, meet for a rare in-depth conversation, something they never did together during their coaching careers at Duke and North Carolina.

programme.title: E60
programme.desc: An intimate look at the life of Dan Hurley, a basketball coach striving to carve his own path in a family synonymous with hoops.

programme.title: Portraits: Roy Williams
programme.desc: Legendary college basketball coach Roy Williams shares his approach to life and basketball on Portraits.

programme.title: Men's College Volleyball
programme.desc: From Pauley Pavilion presented by Wescom Financial in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Live: Unsportsmanlike with Evan, Canty and Michelle
programme.desc: Start the day off right with Chris Canty, Evan Cohen and Michelle Smallmon providing an energizing and informative way to take on the day. Sports, life and laughter are what it's all about.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 9 seed Crimson Tide take another shot at the No. 8 Sooners in a College Football Playoff first-round game. Oklahoma won at Alabama 23-21 on Nov. 15. The Sooners and Crimson Tide are two of five SEC programs in the 12-team CFP field.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: The No. 7 Aggies host the No. 10 Hurricanes in the College Football Playoff's first round. Texas A&M saw its undefeated season, and its chance at the SEC title, spoiled in a Nov. 28 loss at Texas. These programs traded home wins in 2022 and 2023.

programme.title: CFP Quarterfinal at the Goodyear Cotton Bowl Classic
programme.desc: The No. 10 Miami Hurricanes face the No. 2 Ohio State Buckeyes at AT&T Stadium. This is a high-stakes College Football Playoff Quarterfinal matchup. Miami advanced after a gritty 10-3 road upset over No. 7 Texas A&M in the CFP First Round.

programme.title: Nine for IX
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the legendary University of Tennessee Lady Volunteers coach, Pat Summitt, from her exceptional career to her new life fighting early-onset Alzheimer's.

programme.title: SEC Storied
programme.desc: Exploring the rise, fall and rebirth of a legendary coach and a time when the state of Arkansas was at the epicenter of American culture.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: The Netherlands remain the greatest football nation never to win the World Cup, Florian Wirtz is Germany's latest superstar, and we hear from some referees officiating in the biggest tournament of their lives.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: Scotland will bring the Tartan Army to North America, Curaçao will be the tiniest nation at the Finals, and Memphis Depay will bid to add to his record haul of goals for the Netherlands.

programme.title: Major League Fishing
programme.desc: Four teams compete in elimination match 1 to advance to the Knockout Rounds. From Shreveport-Bossier City, La.

programme.title: A Fishing Story With Ronnie Green
programme.desc: Julian Brown is an environmental innovator and entrepreneur who developed Plastoline, a technology that transforms plastic waste into usable fuel. He walks us through his journey as a pioneer that's changing the world.

programme.title: Pure Outdoor
programme.desc: Outdoor sports from all over the world, from freestyle ski jumping to airplane aerobatics.

programme.title: Offroad Odyssey
programme.desc: Adrenaline-pumping action, breathtaking scenery, and unforgettable encounter off-road.

programme.title: She's in the Game
programme.desc: Meet the next generation of superstar female athletes around the country as we go behind the scenes to shine the light on them and their interests off the field, along with catching up with the female legends who paved the way for all this growth.

programme.title: Sports Stars of Tomorrow
programme.desc: Profiles of the top rookie, college and high-school talent in sports; current athletes share their experiences, advice and personal impressions of the road to stardom.

programme.title: The Short List
programme.desc: The sports countdown, featuring iconic themes focused upon the memorable moments and individuals in sports; the 10 memorable debuts, the 10 revered innovators, the comebacks of all time and much more.

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: The Iconic
programme.desc: Stories behind celebrated events, institutions, clubs, players, rivalries and moments in sport.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: The Netherlands remain the greatest football nation never to win the World Cup, Florian Wirtz is Germany's latest superstar, and we hear from some referees officiating in the biggest tournament of their lives.

programme.title: The Contenders 2026
programme.desc: Scotland will bring the Tartan Army to North America, Curaçao will be the tiniest nation at the Finals, and Memphis Depay will bid to add to his record haul of goals for the Netherlands.

programme.title: Fairways of Life
programme.desc: New York Times's Best Seller and Golf Channel Host Matt Adams provides unforgettable interviews with golf's legends and stars, as well as lively interactive discussions about the game, travel and the latest in golf equipment.

programme.title: Golfing the World
programme.desc: Highlighting golf courses and private resorts from around the world.

programme.title: Golf Life
programme.desc: Featuring the latest trends, tours of the finest courses and tips from golf experts.

programme.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: Tired of Pain? Go Drug-Free
programme.desc: See how a drug-free patch is helping people find relief-without medication.

programme.title: Pain Relief Revealed
programme.desc: Discover the hidden story of OmegaXL with John Walsh. He dives deep into the groundbreaking supplement that promises hope and relief for millions battling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5
Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5
Moser, Lombardi & Kane on Altitude Radio 92.5

programme.desc: The Netherlands remain the greatest football nation never to win the World Cup, Florian Wirtz is Germany's latest superstar, and we hear from some referees officiating in the biggest tournament of their lives.

programme.title: The Short List

programme.title: Invincible
programme.desc: Periods of unrivaled domination in sport, including chapters from sport's greatest careers and iconic dynasties.

programme.title: Live MNF: Spurs v Leeds Utd
programme.desc: Following another pressure-relieving victory for Spurs, it's Leeds next at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium as the hosts target a third consecutive win in their fight for survival.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Live NBA Playoffs
programme.desc: A match-up from the NBA playoffs.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Sky Sports Breakfast
programme.desc: Stay across the biggest sports stories this morning with a wrap-up of the headlines.

programme.title: Live: Sky Sports FC
programme.desc: Have your say on the big talking points in this interactive show covering the major football headlines.

programme.title: Lunchtime Live
programme.desc: Sit down with Sky Sports News as the team break down all the sports stories making the headlines this lunchtime.

programme.title: Sports Desk
programme.desc: A breakdown of the stories hitting the news desk this afternoon, with live analysis and comment plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Live IPL Gujarat.T v Sunrisers.H
programme.desc: Gujarat Titans face Sunrisers Hyderabad in the IPL.

programme.title: Sports Centre
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Live EFL P/O: So'ton v M'boro
programme.desc: The second leg of a Sky Bet Championship play-off semi-final.

programme.title: Sky Sports News
programme.desc: Round-up of the sports news with live analysis and comments, plus extended interviews with the headline makers.

programme.title: Live: Pardon the Interruption
programme.desc: The debate is the story in this fast-paced, half-hour series hosted by former Washington Post sportswriters Tony Kornheiser and Michael Wilbon. The pair engage in high-energy discussions, conduct interviews and often argue over topics not even related to sports. Other sports reporters appear as guests and offer opinions on the top stories of the day.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Eastern Conference Second Round, Game 5. (if necessary).

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Western Conference Second Round, Game 4.

programme.title: Live: Get Up
programme.desc: ESPN's morning show features host Mike Greenberg with a rotating and diverse group of analysts opining about and analyzing the latest news from the world of sports. The two-hour, personality-driven show originates from Hudson Square in Lower Manhattan, a modern media hub for ESPN and The Walt Disney Company's New York-based teams. Greenberg, aka "Greeny," is formerly one-half of ESPN Radio's longt

programme.title: Live: First Take
programme.desc: Stephen A. Smith hosts this weekday morning sports debate show. Smith provides his expert takes on the day's trending sports topics and under-the-radar news. They're regularly joined by veteran analysts and the top guests in sports and entertainment.

programme.title: Live: The Pat McAfee Show
programme.desc: Former NFL punter Pat McAfee brings his humor and candor to the microphone to highlight the day's top stories.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter
programme.desc: The latest news, highlights and inside information from every corner of the sports world is presented each day on "SportsCenter," ESPN's first-ever program when the network debuted in September of 1979. The flagship series airs an evening edition and a brand new midnight show each weekday before the stage is cleared for a live "SportsCenter" morning block that emphasizes fast-paced, highlights-dri

programme.title: Live: NBA Today
programme.desc: In-depth, comprehensive daily coverage of all aspects of the NBA from expert analysts.

programme.title: NFL Live
programme.desc: Host Laura Rutledge takes the helm of this weekday show featuring the likes of Marcus Spears, Dan Orlovsky, Mina Kimes, and Adam Schefter. The "NFL Live" crew entertains fans while offering all the latest news and analysis from across the NFL.

programme.title: Live: SportsCenter

programme.title: Live: Men's Giro d'Italia
programme.desc: Coverage from the fourth stage of the race, a 138km route from Catanzaro to Cosenza. This stage last year saw a 189km route from Alberobello to Lecce that was won by Dutch cyclist Casper van Uden, as he picked up his one and only victory of the race. Great Britain's Simon Yates won last year's race ahead of Mexico's Isaac del Toro and Ecuador's Richard Carapaz.

programme.desc: Orlando Pride v North Carolina Courage.

programme.title: The Gallagher PREM - The Wrap Up
programme.desc: A look back at all of the biggest stories and best action from the 15th round of fixtures, including Bristol Bears v Saracens, Exeter Chiefs v Bath Rugby, and more.

programme.title: Charlie Moore Outdoors
programme.desc: Charlie heads out to fish for summertime largemouth and smallmouth bass. The weather plays a factor as the temperature soars to 101 degrees. Charlie preps summertime Maine lobsters and littleneck clams.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: Ultimate Frisbee Association
programme.desc: Coverage of the semi-professional ultimate frisbee league in North America.

programme.title: Fight Sports: World Class Championship Boxing
programme.desc: From Oct. 15, 2022 at O2 Arena in London.

programme.title: Fight Sports MMA
programme.desc: From June 23, 2018, in Johannesburg, South Africa.

programme.title: World Championship Kickboxing
programme.desc: Highlights from some of the world's greatest kickboxing matches.

programme.title: Fight Sports: Grand Sumo
programme.desc: This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 3 from Tokyo, Japan - Ryogoku, Kokugikan.

programme.title: Fight Sports: Grand Sumo
programme.desc: This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4 featuring Takarafuji, Yoshikaze, Takakeisho and Daishomaru from the Natsu basho, 2018.

programme.title: Fight Sports Martial Arts
programme.desc: Coverage of judo, sumo, karate and other disciplines of martial arts.

programme.title: In Depth With Graham Bensinger
programme.desc: Graham sits down with two-time NASCAR champ Kyle Busch in North Carolina; featuring conversations with Kyle's wife Samantha, brother Kurt Busch, and others in his inner circle.

programme.title: Life in Between Gates
programme.desc: Profiles of some of the world's best alpine ski racers as they travel to some of the top ski destinations in the U.S. and compete on the World Pro Ski Tour.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Professional poker action from a series of international tournaments.

programme.title: Ultimate Frisbee Association
programme.desc: Coverage of the semi-professional ultimate frisbee league in North America.

programme.title: SportsWrap With Jason Page
programme.desc: A timely sports wrap-up show with expert commentary and highlights by longtime NBC Sports and ESPN Radio host Jason Page.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Hope for Pain Sufferers
programme.desc: In this compelling investigation, John Walsh delves into OmegaXL and its natural origins; discover how this innovative supplement can provide relief from joint pain and improve your quality of life, all grounded in extensive research.

programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Mark Your Card
programme.desc: A preview of the day's racing with live news from the courses.

programme.title: Live Racing
programme.desc: Today's live racing action from Beverley, Killarney and Sligo.

programme.title: Luck on Sunday
programme.desc: Nick Luck has the best interviews from expert guests in our unmissable weekly show.

programme.title: Racing Replay
programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from Beverley.

programme.desc: Another chance to watch today's racing action from Killarney and Sligo.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger knocks down a huge trophy whitetail buck in Northern Missouri.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: In the flooded cornfields of northeastern South Dakota, Steven finds ideal conditions for duck hunting with Cal and waterfowl expert Sean Weaver.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: MLB player Pete Alonso fulfills a dream by hunting mule deer with Steven at a private ranch in southern Colorado.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Melissa heads to Texas for her first ever hunt for blackbuck.

programme.title: Bloodline Hunting
programme.desc: Travel with Matt Bullins as he journeys through grassroots America, seeking out new adventures and uncovering the rich bloodlines that define our hunting culture. Along the way, he highlights the people, histories, and experiences that keep these timeless traditions thriving.

programme.title: Night Crew
programme.desc: Night hunting the world.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: Steve West hunts with a longtime outfitter, guide, and friend in coastal Alaska for black bear.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Nick takes his dad to Iowa searching for redemption in the second gun season.

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Predator Pursuit TV, hosted by Jeff Thomason, is a rare blend of fast action predator hunting and educational material all rolled into one. Jeff will be taking viewers all over the world chasing a variety of dangerous predators. Prepare to be entertained, and informed, on different tactics to help you become a more successful hunter and put more fur in the back of your truck!

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Innovative designs for new hunting products.

programme.title: Jim Shockey's: The Professionals
programme.desc: Seeking out new and dangerous game territory proves challenging.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: In the flooded cornfields of northeastern South Dakota, Steven finds ideal conditions for duck hunting with Cal and waterfowl expert Sean Weaver.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: MLB player Pete Alonso fulfills a dream by hunting mule deer with Steven at a private ranch in southern Colorado.

programme.title: Night Crew
programme.desc: Night hunting the world.

programme.title: Steve's Outdoor Adventures
programme.desc: Steve West hunts with a longtime outfitter, guide, and friend in coastal Alaska for black bear.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Nick takes his dad to Iowa searching for redemption in the second gun season.

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Predator Pursuit TV, hosted by Jeff Thomason, is a rare blend of fast action predator hunting and educational material all rolled into one. Jeff will be taking viewers all over the world chasing a variety of dangerous predators. Prepare to be entertained, and informed, on different tactics to help you become a more successful hunter and put more fur in the back of your truck!

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Innovative designs for new hunting products.

programme.title: Hit Squad Outdoors With Tim Sylvia
programme.desc: This week Blaine Anthony is in the Midwest hunting whitetail on a hunt of a lifetime.

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Walleye fishing in the southern part of the state and the northern part, in the spring and through the ice as well as a look at Michigan's DNR partnering with the National Guard.

programme.title: Grace Camo and Lace
programme.desc: Grace, Camo & Lace follows the Armstrong sisters on hunting adventures across North America. While in pursuit of big and small game, Alli and Adriana bring a fresh look and youthful energy to the hunting industry. The sisters have been hunting since they were five years old and share a passion for hunting and the outdoor lifestyle. The entire Armstrong family gets in on the action as they join All

programme.title: The Gamekeepers of Mossy Oak
programme.desc: This week, Dr. Marcus Lashley of the University of Florida joins us to explain his team's ongoing wild turkey poult research. It's fascinating stuff. Listen to the full conversation on Gamekeeper Podcast #332.

programme.title: In Fisherman TV
programme.desc: Always in touch with the hottest tactics happening for each new season, the In-Fisherman staff captures the historic rise of the paddletail swimbait for walleyes; revealing one of the most fundamentally productive tactics ever developed for largemouth bass; highlighting proven tools of the trade for giant pike.

programme.title: The Fishmonger
programme.desc: Tommy is in Virginia for blue crab, and the highly invasive blue catfish; it's a shocking ordeal to get the blue cats on the dinner plate; there's aqua culture, and a race track.

programme.title: Two Conchs Adventures
programme.desc: Joined by repeat client Bryan Russel, the plan is to head offshore for mahi mahi, permit and cobia.

programme.title: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks
programme.desc: Accomplished angler Dustin Wilks fishes various bass fishing locations and teaches how to find and catch more fish. Loaded with fish catches, Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks is a show that is action-packed and shows the viewer numerous techniques for catching bass. Dustin's straightforward approach coupled with his whimsical demeanor makes Catching Bass with Dustin Wilks the perfect teaching platf

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and Mike Hehner explore Minnesota's Lake Vermilion and bust out all the tricks for summer walleyes.

programme.title: Ducks Unlimited
programme.desc: DUTV Co-Host Colin Mulligan and good friend and DUTV producer Brandon Fien head to Brandon's home stomping grounds to give the DUTV audience a taste of all that California has to offer. Colin chases sea ducks, specifically goldeneyes. We explore the importance of the Golden Triangle for which the Butte Sink of California is included and all that DU is doing in this critical habitat.

programme.title: Winchester Deadly Passion
programme.desc: Melissa heads to Texas for her first ever hunt for blackbuck.

programme.title: Winchester & Drury's Natural Born
programme.desc: Experience the ultimate connection between man and nature with Winchester and Drury Outdoors Natural Born! Whether you love fired-up gobblers, monster whitetails, or Western adventure, Natural Born immerses you in the beauty of nature and the raw authenticity of the hunt. We were born for this!

programme.title: MTN Top Outdoors
programme.desc: MTN Top Outdoors is brought to you by Butch Bauer and Jeremiah Voithofer, with a focus on the hunt, fish cook mentality. They showcase a program promoting family values, commitment to the outdoors and making memories through experiences of hunting and fishing. At the end of every episode, we have a 3-minute cooking segment featuring 5S star culinary chef Hunt Chef - Jeremy Critchfield.

programme.title: Everything Eichler
programme.desc: A closer look at the Eichler Field to Table lifestyle; a combination of the daily challenges of ranching, farming and running an outfitting business in Colorado.

programme.title: Dropped: Project Origin
programme.desc: Favorite moments from "Dropped" seasons 1-8.

programme.title: JT Kenney's Florida Bass
programme.desc: Join pro angler JT Kenney as he embarks on an epic journey across Florida, navigating its diverse waters in pursuit of monstrous bass, showcasing the thrill of the chase and the beauty of the Sunshine State's landscapes.

programme.title: Lindner's Angling Edge
programme.desc: Jeremy Smith and Mike Hehner explore Minnesota's Lake Vermilion and bust out all the tricks for summer walleyes.

programme.title: Fishing 411
programme.desc: Host and producer Mark Romanack shares his 30-plus years of professional fishing savvy with viewers.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Capt. Don Dingman teaches children the tricks of angling in world-class fisheries.

programme.title: Art of Wild
programme.desc: Nick takes his dad to Iowa searching for redemption in the second gun season.

programme.title: MOJO TV
programme.desc: Innovative designs for new hunting products.

programme.title: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: Predator Pursuit TV, hosted by Jeff Thomason, is a rare blend of fast action predator hunting and educational material all rolled into one. Jeff will be taking viewers all over the world chasing a variety of dangerous predators. Prepare to be entertained, and informed, on different tactics to help you become a more successful hunter and put more fur in the back of your truck!

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: Walleye fishing in the southern part of the state and the northern part, in the spring and through the ice as well as a look at Michigan's DNR partnering with the National Guard.

programme.title: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Chef Scott explores both coasts; first up, invasive, toothy air-breathing snakeheads in Florida; then, Northern California for rattlesnakes; both are cooked and put to the taste test.

programme.title: Guns & Ammo TV
programme.desc: We discuss the ins & outs of buying a suppressor.

programme.title: Reel Animals
programme.desc: Captain Mike Anderson and Captain Ozzie Lessinger take advantage of the springtime bite at South Seas Island Resort.

programme.title: Hook the Future
programme.desc: Capt. Don Dingman teaches children the tricks of angling in world-class fisheries.

programme.title: Heartland Waterfowl
programme.desc: Mallards, Honkers, Specks and Snow geese, Saskatchewan delivers five unforgettable days; Big spins, mixed bags, and nonstop action-plus a rare chance for the camera crew to join the fun.

programme.title: Our Way of Life
programme.desc: Heather Douville reconnects with her Tlingit heritage through teachings from her father, Mike Douville; a recognition of the critical need to safeguard traditional food sources and maintain ecosystem balance.

programme.title: Relentless Pursuit
programme.desc: Tim Wells hosts episode after episode featuring incredible shots on everything from hogs to frogs.

programme.title: Pigman: The Series
programme.desc: Brian Pigman Quaca is a true-blue original-an unapologetic, high-energy host with a larger-than-life personality that has redefined outdoor television. With an unrelenting passion for the chase, Pigman takes on the world's toughest hunts, using any legal means necessary to put game on the ground. While his reputation was built on hardcore hog hunting, don't be mistaken-his skills extend far beyond

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Traveling by pack mules, Steven heads into the wilds of western Montana with friend Clay Newcomb in search of wild turkey and black bear.

programme.title: MeatEater
programme.desc: Steve and Janis visit the fish shack in Alaska to trap crabs and shrimp, dive for sea cucumbers and scallops and hook some halibut and black cod.

programme.title: Realtree's Monster Bucks
programme.desc: David Blanton looks at hunts from kids hunting Realtree farms.

programme.title: Backwoods Life
programme.desc: For over 20 years Michael Lee and Kevin Knighton have been blessed to bring the Backwoods Life hunting show and outdoor television into the homes of loyal viewers each week. The guys work hard to bring their lives, personalities, and experiences to the show while demonstrating what the average person goes through each year trying to fill tags and their freezers.

programme.title: Roger Raglin Outdoors
programme.desc: Roger knocks down a huge trophy whitetail buck in Northern Missouri.

programme.desc: Nick Kypreos and Justin Bourne talk all things in the NHL.

programme.title: The Obsession of Carter Andrews
programme.desc: Fishing with his wife, Heidi, Carter looks for a peacock bass weighing at least 20 pounds while fishing the Rio Marié deep in the Amazon jungle.

programme.title: Zona's Awesome Fishing Show
programme.desc: Pro Bass angler Greg Hackney is back with Z to check in on the progress of one of the best Bass fishing lakes on the planet.

programme.desc: Ott DeFoe returns to a secluded lake known for large bass to determine if he can successfully catch them.

programme.title: Lisa Roper Outdoors
programme.desc: At Cheemo Lodge, Lisa experiences the best pike fishing of her life, landing trophy after trophy in an adrenaline-filled episode that showcases the true apex predators of the north.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher
programme.desc: Guests of the series will instruct viewers in something new and interesting about fly-fishing.

programme.title: Extreme Angler TV
programme.desc: Blasting smallmouth bass on loud prop baits over thick weeds in Northwest Ontario from Kingfisher Lodge.

programme.desc: La Reserve Beauchene in Quebec has both luxurious accommodations and amazing fishing, for a multitude of species.

programme.title: Legends of Rod & Reel
programme.desc: Larry Dahlberg sets out to find the world's biggest fish in the world's most remote spots.

programme.title: Bass Pro Shops Fisherman's Handbook
programme.desc: During the spring of the year, bass move shallow and begin to spawn. When this happens, a large majority of the bass population in a given fishery moves up shallow, where the anglers can easily see them.

programme.title: Fishing University
programme.desc: Ben and Charlie are running their Falcon's solo this on Georgia's Lake Hartwell, learning about how to catch Herring related fish.
